payload.answer: The Brain Slack agent project transitions from planned/open status to implemented status. The new state supersedes the existing state.
payload.decision: Accept new state as superseding existing state; archive prior open status

entity_resolution.reason: Same entity referenced in both existing and new state; temporal progression indicates status update rather than new entity

payload.intent: Resolve temporal status transition conflict for Brain Slack agent project

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented
The Brain Slack agent was planned with status=open

details: Prior state archived as historical record
Current state committed as durable memory
Entity identity preserved across state transition

repair_options: Retain only current implemented status and archive open status with timestamp
